arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer news: Modibo Sagnan 'closely interesting' Championship promotion contenders
arts.sum: Leeds United are allegedly contemplating an approach for a defender who is facing relegation with a top-flight club in one of European football's major leagues.

arts.ttl: Boro v Leeds United preview: Farke selection news
arts.sum: Leeds United travel up to Middlesbrough this evening knowing that they will need to get back to winning ways as soon as possible after three straight draws. It means that there will be a change at centre-back this evening, but the question is whether Ethan Ampadu takes his place, or remains in midfield to retain balance and control.

arts.ttl: Leeds show interest in Montpellier’s Modibo Sagnan
arts.sum: A summer clearout is anticipated at Montpellier HSC. La Paillade are rock-bottom of Ligue 1 and 11 points behind Stade de Reims, who occupy the relegation spot with just six games remaining.…

arts.ttl: Leeds United ‘keen’ to sign 25-year-old from relegation doomed club
arts.sum: Leeds United are in contention to return to the Premier League via direct promotion this season. The Championship club dropped to the third spot, a point behind second placed Sheffield United and two behind leaders Burnley. Leeds, meanwhile, have started working on improving their squad for next season. arts.ttl: Leeds United's Patrick Bamford fitness boost and Daniel Farke's Middlesbrough verdict
arts.sum: But in poor form of late after just one win in their last six games, they have been hit by injuries to defender Pascal Struijk and midfielder Joe Rothwell. Like Boro, it leaves Leeds short on defensive options, with Farke assessing his defensive options ahead of the game.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Middlesbrough with two players absent amid Mateo Joseph boost
arts.sum: Ilia Gruev, Brenden Aaronson and Patrick Bamford are pushing for places, with the Whites manager likely to rotate his squad after Saturday's disappointing draw at Luton Town. Daniel Farke is contemplating making changes to his Leeds United starting line-up as they go in search of a first win on the road since February 24.
